perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses and a black beret is talking directly to the camera in a studio setting. (2) Footage of a white Hyundai IONIQ 6 electric vehicle in an indoor parking garage; a white robotic arm moves toward the vehicle's rear charging port. (3) Close-up view of the robotic arm's sensor identifying the port and successfully inserting the charging plug. (4) The scene returns to the man in the studio, who uses expressive hand gestures while speaking. (5) Graphic overlays and bullet points appear on screen to highlight technical challenges.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks in Traditional Chinese with an energetic and informative tone. Light, upbeat electronic background music plays at a low volume. (2) Mechanical whirring and motor sounds are heard faintly during the shots of the robotic arm moving. (3) Sharp 'whoosh' and 'ding' sound effects coincide with the appearance of text overlays and scene cuts.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Social media handles for '3c有意思tim哥' and '3ctim' appear at the top (Functional). (2) Narrative subtitles translate the spoken commentary throughout the video (Functional). (3) Bold text '全自動充電機器人' (Fully Automatic Charging Robot) and '完全不需要下車' (Completely no need to get out of the car) appear as hooks (Hook). (4) Numbered tags '#挑戰1', '#挑戰2', and '#挑戰3' categorize the limitations discussed (Decorative/Effect).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Tech Demonstration -> Technical Critique -> Summary

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator (Tim哥) is the only person visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male wearing a black beret, glasses, and a white graphic t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A blurred indoor studio with neutral walls for the talking-head shots; a concrete indoor parking garage with charging infrastructure for the demonstration shots.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Professional studio lighting; artificial fluorescent lighting in the garage.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Personal Observation -> Tech Intro -> Demo -> Challenges -> Expectation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a tech-news update and critical review of Hyundai's robotic EV charging system at Incheon Airport, highlighting the convenience of hands-free charging while noting the current hardware limitations of vehicles and charging docks.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator provides a critical list of 'challenges,' which is typical of objective tech journalism rather than a paid promotional advertisement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's signature black beret and glasses; '3C有意思Tim哥' branding.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and variety-show style text to make industrial tech news accessible to a general consumer audience.
